title: Sub item connect boards
excerpt: It would be great to be able to see the parent item name when using connect boards with sub items. Currently it only shows the Sub item columns, adding a lot of wasted time switching back and forth between boards. If it …

posts.author: toleary (Trevor O’Leary)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to be able to see the parent item name when using connect boards with sub items. Currently it only shows the Sub item columns, adding a lot of wasted time switching back and forth between boards. If it showed the item name it would add a lot of efficiency and accuracy to our workflow.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @toleary would you mind clarifying where would you expect to see the parent item name?
